title: hemerocallis middendorffii var. exaltata
intro: Hemerocallis middendorffii var. exaltata, also known as the Siberian daylily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hemerocallis genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating wounds and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemerocallis middendorffii var. exaltata include soothing and calming effects on the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Hemerocallis middendorffii var. exaltata is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
